title: As a reviewer, I want Property Type and Home Value Metadata AI guidelines that distinguish correct metadata alignment, mismatches, and unsupported cases, so that scoring is consistent
description:
Feature: Property Type and Home Value Metadata AI guidelines for Suco - Home Improvement

Scenario: Metadata matches supported property type and home value evidence
Given a transcript where property type and home value are discussed and the metadata matches the supported value or valid mapping
When the reviewer evaluates the conversation
Then the score should be Yes

Scenario: Metadata conflicts with the call or required probing is missing
Given a transcript where the metadata does not match the supported value or the agent failed to probe after a large value range
When the reviewer evaluates the conversation
Then the score should be No

Scenario: The metadata cannot be supported from the call
Given a transcript where property type or home value was not discussed or metadata appears blank or unsupported by the transcript
When the reviewer evaluates the conversation
Then the score should be NA

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Pulled the current Property Type and Home Value Metadata AI score from Plexus. Existing guidelines are missing on the champion version, so I am drafting an initial Yes/No/NA guidelines document from the live score YAML and will validate it before any push.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Validated the new Property Type and Home Value Metadata AI guidelines with skills/plexus-guidelines/validate_guidelines.py and pushed them to Plexus as score version af242924-9fe3-4246-ace3-37c151b62a62. The new version is not champion-promoted; this change adds the missing guidelines document.
